title: WAF SQL Injection Attack Allowed Through
description: Detects SQL injection attempts that were ALLOWED through WAF (detection-only mode or rule bypass). Critical alert indicating potential successful exploitation.
query: ('Log Source' = 'OCI WAF Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC WAF Security Logs') and (('Action' = 'DETECT') and (('Request URL' like '* OR 1=1*' or 'Request URL' like '* or 1=1*' or 'Request URL' like '*1=1*' or 'Request URL' like '*\' OR 1=1*' or 'Request URL' like '*\' or 1=1*' or 'Request URL' like '*\' OR \'1\'=\'1*' or 'Request URL' like '*\' or \'1\'=\'1*' or 'Request URL' like '*\' AND 1=1*' or 'Request URL' like '*%27%20OR%201%3D1*' or 'Request URL' like '*%27+OR+1%3D1*' or 'Request URL' like '*UNION SELECT*' or 'Request URL' like '*union select*' or 'Request URL' like '*UNION%20SELECT*' or 'Request URL' like '*DROP TABLE*' or 'Request URL' like '*drop table*' or 'Request URL' like '*--*' or 'Request URL' like '*INFORMATION_SCHEMA*' or 'Request URL' like '*information_schema*' or 'Request URL' like '*SLEEP(*' or 'Request URL' like '*BENCHMARK(*' or 'Request URL' like '*EXTRACTVALUE(*')))
falsepositives: WAF in detection-only mode during initial tuning
